untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific metrics (implied volatility skew, time decay, delta-neutral positioning, realized vs implied volatility spread) which are not available in the equity price/technical indicator set. The core logic of 'IV skew threshold', 'position delta tolerance', and 'time decay captured %' cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Approximated entry with RANGING regime and low ATR conditions, but exit condition based on realized/implied vol comparison is not translatable.
translation_notes: This is an options time-spread strategy requiring volatility term structure analysis. Translated the stable/ranging market condition and low realized volatility entry requirement using available indicators (RANGING regime + atr_14 proxy for low realized vol). Exit based on vol expansion is approximated as atr_14 > hvol_20. True implementation requires option chain data (IV term structure, greeks, time value decay) not available in standard technical indicators.
